TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Djineljepan Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Djineljepan a niyaro', 167 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 559 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 520 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 39 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 95%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮjinəɾjəpan itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮjinəɾjəpan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Djineljepan Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Djineljepan a niyaro', 167 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 559 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 520 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 39 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 95%, Amis 2%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɬ~ɮjinəɾjəpan itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮjinəɾjəpan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, tajaɾ *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
